item.title: The Epstein files have brought a wave of resignations and investigations
item.description: A number of prominent figures have stepped down or are facing investigations after their communications with Jeffrey Epstein and his former longtime c...

item.title: The State of the Union brings a big audience for Trump. But does it matter?
item.description: In the age of algorithm-driven social media feeds, the audience for the speech is increasingly fragmented and entrenched in their political positions.

item.title: U.S. women’s hockey team declines Trump’s State of the Union invitation
item.description: The players “were honored to be included and are grateful for the acknowledgement,” according to a team statement.

item.title: Trump’s top general foresees acute risks in an attack on Iran
item.description: The Joint Chiefs of Staff chairman has said that a lack of munitions and allied support could mean greater danger for U.S. troops, people familiar wit...

item.title: Coast Guard investigating swastika found at recruit training center
item.description: The incident follows a controversy last year when officials temporarily downgraded the hate symbol to “potentially divisive” in the service’s workplac...
